title: comments
description:
comments

Comments

Use comments to add notes to your programs. An apostrophe character (') starts a comment.
examples:
Function Main ' ****** Main Demo Program ****** Xqt conveyor ' Start up the task for conveyor Do
    Print "Press ENTER to run demo cycle"
    Print "Press CTRL+C to quit"
    Input dumy
    Call demo ' Execute the demo function Loop ' Return to start of main loop
Fend
